menu.title: PixelRealm
menu.subtitle: A Living MMORPG World
menu.play_prompt: ▶  Press SPACE or Click to Play  ◀
menu.controls_hint: WASD: Move  |  SPACE: Attack  |  ESC: Pause
pause.title: — PAUSED —
settings.title: SETTINGS
settings.access_hint: Press ? or F1 in-game for keybind list
tutorial.welcome.title: Welcome to PixelRealm!
tutorial.welcome.body: Use WASD (or Arrow Keys) to move your character around the zone.
tutorial.combat_attack.title: Combat — Attack
tutorial.combat_attack.body: Press SPACE to swing your weapon. Hit enemies to score kills!
tutorial.combat_dodge.title: Combat — Dodge Roll
tutorial.combat_dodge.body: Press Q to dodge-roll in your movement direction. Costs mana, grants invincibility frames. Hold Shift to sprint (drains stamina bar).
tutorial.combat_sprint.title: Combat — Sprint
tutorial.combat_sprint.body: Hold SHIFT while moving to sprint. You move faster but drain mana.
tutorial.inventory.title: Inventory
tutorial.inventory.body: Press I to open your inventory. Equip gear and use items collected from enemies.
tutorial.skill_tree.title: Skill Tree
tutorial.skill_tree.body: Press K to open the Skill Tree. Choose Warrior or Mage and unlock powerful abilities!
tutorial.hud.title: HUD Overview
tutorial.hud.body: Red = HP  ·  Blue = Mana  ·  Yellow = XP  ·  Top-right = Wave info
tutorial.minimap.title: Mini-Map
tutorial.minimap.body: Press M to toggle the mini-map (top-right). Yellow = you, Red = enemies.
tutorial.quests.title: Quests & NPCs
tutorial.quests.body: Press E near an NPC to accept quests. Clear all waves and defeat the boss to unlock new zones!
tutorial.ready.title: Ready for Adventure!
tutorial.ready.body: Tutorial complete. Defeat all waves and the zone boss to progress. Good luck!
